message:
fix(tui/compose): surface send failures to console log instead of silent swallow (br-l71li)

Both the DB-open and dispatch-error paths in dispatch_compose_envelope
previously only logged to tracing and returned silently. The TUI user
had no indication their message failed to send.

Now both paths push a visible error line to push_console_log so the
operator sees the failure in the console. Two regression tests verify
the console-log output for each failure mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
